options.content:
### MongoDB Command Center
Replica-set leadership, operator state, pod placement, and WiredTiger pressure in one view.

panels.title: Mongo Members
panels.description: Count of selected mongod members scraped by Prometheus.

panels.title: Ready Mongo Pods
panels.description: Ready MongoDB StatefulSet pods in the selected namespace.

panels.title: Primary Members
panels.description: Primary count across the selected members. This query is tolerant to label casing.

panels.title: Secondary Members
panels.description: Secondary count across the selected members. This query is tolerant to label casing.

panels.title: Operator Ready
panels.description: Ready MongoDB Kubernetes operator pods.

panels.title: Connections
panels.description: Current client connections across the selected members.

panels.title: Read Tickets
panels.description: Lowest available WiredTiger read tickets among the selected members.

panels.title: Write Tickets
panels.description: Lowest available WiredTiger write tickets among the selected members.

panels.title: Resident Memory
panels.description: Total resident memory reported by the selected mongod members.

panels.title: Disk Free
panels.description: Total free disk space visible to the selected members.

panels.title: Mongo Restarts
panels.description: Total restart count across MongoDB member containers.

panels.title: Operator Restarts
panels.description: Total restart count across MongoDB operator containers.

options.content:
### Control Plane & Topology
See replica-set roles, pod placement across DB nodes, and which operator image is actually running.

panels.title: Replica Set Members

targets.expr: max by (instance, replica_state_name, process_port, mongodb_version, rs_nm) (mongodb_info{process_type="mongod",instance=~"$instance"})

panels.description: Replica-set membership, role, port, and MongoDB version for each selected member.

panels.title: Mongo Pod Placement
panels.description: Kubernetes placement for each MongoDB member pod.

panels.title: Operator Control Plane
panels.description: Active MongoDB operator container image and pod identity.

options.content:
### Traffic & Capacity
Workload flow, replica-level pressure, and the fastest way to spot a node drifting away from the others.

panels.title: Connections by Member
panels.description: Current client connections split by Mongo member.

panels.title: Network Throughput
panels.description: Ingress and egress throughput per member.

panels.title: Disk Utilization by Member
panels.description: Current disk usage percentage by member.

panels.title: Opcounters
panels.description: Operation rates summed across the selected replica-set members.

panels.title: Memory Footprint
panels.description: Resident and virtual memory reported by mongod.

options.content:
### Storage Engine & I/O
WiredTiger behavior, disk capacity, and kernel-level pressure that usually shows up before a user-visible incident.

panels.title: Disk Used vs Free
panels.description: Disk consumption and free space from Mongo hardware metrics.

panels.title: WiredTiger Cache Writes
panels.description: Bytes per second written from the WiredTiger cache.

panels.title: Ticket Availability
panels.description: Remaining concurrent read and write tickets in WiredTiger.

panels.title: Page Faults
panels.description: Page faults per second by member. Persistent spikes often point to memory pressure.

panels.title: Disk I/O Weighted Time
panels.description: Weighted disk I/O time trend from Mongo hardware metrics.

list.description: Kubernetes namespace where MongoDB member and operator pods run.
list.label: Namespace
list.name: kubeNamespace

list.description: MongoDB member instances exposed through the Mongo Prometheus endpoint.
list.label: Mongo Members
list.name: instance
